sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n76984" key="paliourofo/ros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πᾰλῐουροφόρος</orth> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">θρῖναξ, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen></foreign>, three-pronged fork <sense id="n76984.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">made of the wood of the</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">παλίουρος</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4085.tlg001:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1</biblScope></bibl></cit>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.95</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Antiphil.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
